divergence: Corporations replaced nation-states and citizenship now comes with a loyalty program
story_angle: solemn obituary for a beloved institution nobody can remember the purpose of
headline: Nation Grieves as Kkorr-Vvax Fealty Stamp Bureau Molts into Oblivion
deck: Forgettable Layers of Loyalty Now Just a Sad Memory—Shiny Cards No Longer Accepted.
article:
In an unforeseen twist of cosmic irony, the Kkorr-Vvax Fealty Stamp Bureau has officially closed its luminous doors, leaving the citizenry of Rhyion in a state of frantic mourning. This beloved institution, renowned for processing a staggering 2.4 million double-stamped loyalty cards per molt cycle, served as the cornerstone of corporate citizenship, ensuring that every resident's pigment-packed personality could be adequately recorded and cataloged—until it was promptly forgotten after this year's molt.

"It was the only thing that kept us connected, really," lamented Tez-Zet, a long-time cardholder from the Kkev-Ttir Reef. "Now I can't even redeem my points for a Ozzor-Flame Glow Cube!" Residents have taken to adorning their bioluminescent homes with black-bordered pulse-lanterns, a gesture of attachment to a ledger whose benefits no one can quite recall.

The Bureau's dissolution has sparked outrage comparable to grumblings over more tangible losses, yet few recall what benefits the loyalty stamps actually provided. "Clearly, this is a national tragedy," asserted Greeb-Liss, the local corporate spokesperson who spoke at the public mourning rally, conveniently forgetting to mention the exact nature of the Bureau's operations. "We must commemorate our loyalty points with the respect they deserve!"

This announcement is brought to you by Glo-Sheen Crystal Wax: 'Keeps your outer layer loyal and gleaming.' As we forge ahead into a future devoid of stamp-induced delight, the true loss appears to be a collective amnesia that can never be redeemed.
author: Nylee-Dek Luminos, Bureaucratic Correspondent

oped.title: Good Riddance to Those Shiny Cards—Now Try My Atomic Brand!
oped.author: Horace P. Blunderbuss, Platinum Punch-Card Laureate and Self-Appointed Loyalty Czar
oped.body: The nation’s maudlin grief over Kkorr-Vvax’s molting proves once again that sentimentality has no place in proper corporate citizenship. Those obsolete loyalty layers deserved extinction; their cards never glowed properly under atomic test light anyway. Citizens should rejoice that the bureau’s collapse frees them to purchase my superior fallout-etched vouchers, which require weekly exposure to strontium-90 for validation. True loyalty, after all, is measured in rads, not stamps. I, for one, shed no tear—except perhaps when recalling how my own rival collector once amassed two more punch-holes than I. His smug beret, not the bureau’s demise, caused the whole fiasco. Let the shiny relics fade; my irradiated monopoly begins now.

classifieds.text: For Sale: complete book of Kkorr-Vvax atomic loyalty stamps, faintly glowing and utterly void after yesterday's molt. Desperate seller will trade for any new corporate fealty card or a working fallout shelter key.

Help Wanted: fledgling Loyalty Ledger Inc. seeks two clerks to issue fresh 1963-model fealty stamps on chrome cards. Must furnish own Geiger counter and swear off all mention of the late Kkorr-Vvax bureau.
Public Notice: all outstanding Kkorr-Vvax fealty debts are hereby declared null; citizens caught flashing the obsolete shiny cards after midnight will be processed as corporate vagrants.
Personal: to the girl in the fallout shelter queue who stamped my card last week—mine's now worthless. Seeking new loyalty partner with valid 1964 citizenship; bring your own pen.

panels.caption: "The Kkorr-Vvax Fealty Stamp Bureau just shed its final shiny layer. My loyalty card's peeling like reactor paint."
Bureaucrat stamps the air: "New corp-state demands fresh fission oaths. Old stamps go straight to the slag heap."
"At least the half-life matches my new citizenship—thirty years or until the next meltdown."

joke.setup: Citizens who traded their lives for Kkorr-Vvax fealty stamps now face the ultimate corporate write-off.
joke.punchline: The Bureau simply shed its last layer of plutonium and left everyone holding half-life coupons.
joke.text: Citizens who traded their lives for Kkorr-Vvax fealty stamps now face the ultimate corporate write-off. The Bureau simply shed its last layer of plutonium and left everyone holding half-life coupons.

sponsor_ads.headline: Do-It-Yourself Fealty Stamps: Now That Kkorr-Vvax Has Molted
sponsor_ads.body: Our pocket-sized atomic imprinter lets every citizen punch their own loyalty points directly onto irradiated vellum—no bureau required.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Void where citizenship has already expired.

sponsor_ads.headline: Atomic Loyalty Transfer Service
sponsor_ads.body: Migrate your accumulated fealty stamps to a rival corporate sovereign before the Kkorr-Vvax void claims them; one rad-blast and your points belong to someone who still exists.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not responsible for spontaneous nation-state fission.

sponsor_ads.headline: Kkorr-Vvax Memorial Reactor Core
sponsor_ads.body: Honor the fallen bureau with a household atomic pile that glows in the exact shade of expired stamps; perfect for families whose citizenship just lost its favorite punch-card.
sponsor_ads.tagline: May cause unexpected secession from your current loyalty tier.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Emergency Corporate Citizenship Swap
sponsor_ads.body: The Molting Crisis has left millions stamp-less; trade your obsolete Kkorr-Vvax points for a fresh allegiance at our atomic exchange before the next quarterly purge.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Loyalty programs subject to corporate extinction events.

stories.headline: Kkorr-Vvax Collapse Forces Arcologies to Void Legacy Loyalty Ledgers
stories.deck: Firms Rush to Issue Fresh Pulse Stamps Before Next Molt Cycle
stories.article:
Major reef-arcology syndicates recorded an immediate 38 percent drop in redeemable fealty units after the Kkorr-Vvax registry ceased operations. Vvax-Kkor Holdings convened an emergency session of its lattice board to authorize new stamp patterns, warning that unverified accounts would forfeit all accrued glow-units by the end of the fiscal shedding quarter.

Redemption counters at seventeen bioluminescent terminals now require citizens to submit notarized molt certificates in triplicate. One mid-tier conglomerate reported processing delays of up to nine cycles while clerks cross-checked obsolete double-consonant sequences against the defunct central index.

real_world_echo: mirrors Ukrainian outrage over defence minister removal by treating the quiet corporate dissolution of the Bureau as a national tragedy while no one recalls what stamps were for
